name: Druidic
description: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids.

name: Wild Shape
description: You can magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen, following the limitations of the Wild Shape feature.

name: Druid Circle
description: Choose a Druid Circle, which grants additional features as you gain Druid levels.

name: Wild Companion
description: You can expend a use of Wild Shape to cast Find Familiar without material components, summoning a temporary fey familiar.

name: Nature's Sanctuary
description: Beasts and plants are reluctant to attack you, unless magically compelled to do so.

name: Beast Spells
description: You can cast many of your druid spells while using Wild Shape.

name: Archdruid
description: You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times and ignore verbal and somatic spell components while transformed, subject to the feature's rules.
